character.name: A 32px low top-down pixel art fantasy MMORPG archer character. Small green hooded ranger wearing forest green leather armor, short bow in hand, quiver on back, agile ranged fighter silhouette, brown boots and belt. Clean dark outline, readable silhouette, chibi RPG proportions, consistent Tiny Swords style, no background, no text, no labels, centered character, transparent background if possible.
